decisions.title_en: Google commits up to $40B to Anthropic; $10B now at $350B valuation, 5GW Google Cloud over 5 years
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Massive structural shift: Google joins Amazon ($25B last week) in dual-funding Anthropic, who now sits at $350B with run-rate >$30B.

decisions.title_en: DeepSeek launches V4 (1.6T MoE Pro + 284B Flash), 1M token context, hybrid attention, MIT license
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Biggest open-source model release since DeepSeek V3; new Hybrid Attention Architecture (CSA + HCA) cuts KV cache to 10% at 1M tokens. Distinct from `deepseek-20b-valuation` story (funding) — this is the model release.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic adds 16 consumer app connectors to Claude (Spotify, Uber, Instacart, TurboTax, Booking.com, AllTrails, Audible, Resy, StubHub, Taskrabbit, Thumbtack, TripAdvisor, Viator, Credit Karma, Uber Eats)
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First time Claude meaningfully extends into consumer/lifestyle apps; positions Claude as 'front door' to daily life apps competing with ChatGPT consumer push.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic acknowledges 3 specific engineering bugs caused Claude Code's month-long quality decline; March 4 reasoning cut, March 26 caching bug, April 16 system prompt cap
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Distinct from `anthropic-claude-code-pro-flipflop` (Apr 22 pricing flip-flop). This is a technical postmortem on the long-running 'nerfing' controversy with specific dates of code regressions.

decisions.title_en: ICLR 2026 announces Outstanding Papers in Rio de Janeiro: 'Transformers are Inherently Succinct' takes top theoretical award; multi-turn LLM eval paper second
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. ICLR 2026 (Apr 23-27) is the year's premier ML venue; outstanding papers anchor near-term research direction.

decisions.title_en: Bloomberg reports Tencent proposes 20% stake in DeepSeek $20B+ funding round
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-04-22 ('DeepSeek 估值 5 天翻倍到 $200 亿+：腾讯、阿里双双入场'). Today's Bloomberg piece adds the 20% stake detail but the substantive development (Tencent/Alibaba entering the round at $20B+ valuation) was already reported. The percentage figure is incremental, not a new development.

decisions.title_en: CNBC trial preview: Musk v. Altman jury selection begins April 27, 4-week trial
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-04-23 ('Musk v. Altman 周一开庭：$1340 亿索赔、要求罢免 Altman、撤销营利转换'). Today's CNBC piece is a near-trial preview that rehashes claims/witnesses already covered. Wait for actual courtroom developments.

decisions.title_en: Google's TurboQuant gets ICLR 2026 poster session April 25; 6x KV cache reduction at 3-bit
decisions.reason: Underlying news (TurboQuant blog/paper) was March 25 — 31 days old, exceeds 5-day freshness window. The ICLR 2026 poster session today is a venue presentation, not a new development.

decisions.title_en: Apple John Ternus reportedly preparing to succeed Tim Cook amid AI strategy challenges
decisions.reason: Story is too speculative and not concretely AI-pillar — succession reporting without concrete announcement, mostly recycles known Apple AI lag narrative. Skip until firmer development.
